title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!
